Issues: Low Commercial Appeal due to simplicity: The image is a very basic graphic of stylized buildings. While clean, it lacks the complexity, detail, or specific thematic elements that typically drive high commercial sales in stock image or print markets.
Limited Uniqueness: The concept of colorful, abstract cityscapes is common. To increase originality and viability, the design would need a more unique artistic style or a specific, defined theme.

Print Quality/Technical Skill Opportunity: While the rendering is clean, for high-end commercial use, the resolution and line work could be refined to demonstrate higher technical skill, moving beyond simple flat coloring.
Lack of Depth/Compositional Interest: The composition is straightforward. Introducing dynamic elements or more complex perspectives could enhance the visual interest and perceived value.
